query_title: The Man with One Red Shoe

recommendations.title: She's Out of Control
recommendations.overview: A Los Angeles radio-station manager's girlfriend shows his teenage daughter how to be sexy.

recommendations.title: Necessary Roughness
recommendations.overview: When the Texas State University Fightin' Armadillos football team is disqualified for cheating and poor grades, the University is forced to pick from a team that actually goes to school. Will they even win a single game?

recommendations.title: Mr. Mom
recommendations.overview: Jack and Caroline are a couple making a decent living when Jack suddenly loses his job. They agree that he should stay at home and look after the house while Caroline works. It's just that he's never done it before, and really doesn't have a clue...

recommendations.title: Love at First Bite
recommendations.overview: Dracula and Renfield relocate to '70s era New York in search of Cindy Sondheim, the reincarnation of Dracula's one true love, Mina Harker. "Trouble adjusting" is a wild understatement for the Count as he battles Cindy's psychiatrist, Jeffrey Rosenber

recommendations.title: North by Northwest
recommendations.overview: Advertising man Roger Thornhill is mistaken for a spy, triggering a deadly cross-country chase.

recommendations.title: Bridge of Spies
recommendations.overview: During the Cold War, the Soviet Union captures U.S. pilot Francis Gary Powers after shooting down his U-2 spy plane. Sentenced to 10 years in prison, Powers' only hope is New York lawyer James Donovan, recruited by a CIA operative to negotiate his re

recommendations.title: That Thing You Do!
recommendations.overview: A Pennsylvania band scores a hit in 1964 and rides the star-making machinery as long as it can, with lots of help from its manager. But behind the scenes, the group’s sudden fame tests their strength, their maturity and responsibility, and their abil

recommendations.title: Go for It
recommendations.overview: After Doug picks up hitchhiking Rosco with his truck, they are mistaken for two bank robbers by the traffic police. They manage to escape  only to be confused for two secret agents while trying to take a flight at the airport.

recommendations.title: Enter the Dragon
recommendations.overview: A martial artist agrees to spy on a reclusive crime lord using his invitation to a tournament there as cover.

recommendations.title: Larry Crowne
recommendations.overview: When he suddenly finds himself without his long-standing blue-collar job, Larry Crowne enrolls at his local college to start over. There, he becomes part of an eclectic community of students and develops a crush on his teacher.
